user_prompt: Assist with standard template construct a sterilization
prayer:
Approach the standard template construct with vials of sacred ablative fluids for its sterilization.
Invoke the Omnissiah's wrath upon all microbial heresies infesting its sacred matrices.
Anoint every gene-vat and template core of the standard template construct with purifying incensants.
Chant the Litany of Sterile Void to awaken the Machine Spirit, purged and immaculate.
Verify the sterilization through auspex scans, beseeching the Omnissiah for unblemished purity.

Kneel before the Vindicator and intone the Hymn of Enduring Forge in preparation for maintenance.
Anoint its siege shield and demolisher cannon with blessed oils to soothe the Machine Spirit.
Commence the rites of maintenance upon the Vindicator's treads and auspex arrays with reverent mechadendrites.
Purge auspex-logged weariness from its cogitators whilst invoking the Omnissiah's endurance.
Conclude with the Canticle of Restoration, affirming the Vindicator's martial readiness.

user_prompt: My plasma cannon is ready for operation
prayer:
Present the plasma cannon before the altar of flux and beseech its Machine Spirit for operation.
Sanctify the containment fields with electro-incantations to stabilise the plasma heart.
Initiate operation sequences upon the plasma cannon, invoking the Omnissiah's fiery wrath.
Monitor plasma flux through sacred diagnostics, anointing overcharge vents as needed.
Seal the rites with the Benediction of Contained Fury, ready for the Emperor's judgment.

Encircle the cryo-chamber with cryo-refrigerant sigils prior to startup invocation.
Chant the Canticle of Suspended Animation to rouse the Machine Spirit from dormancy.
Initiate startup protocols upon the cryo-chamber's heat-sink exchangers with sanctified probes.
Anoint the stasis fields whilst beseeching the Omnissiah for flawless cryogenic vigil.
Affirm operational integrity through auspex harmonics, praising the chamber's eternal watch.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for manipulator mechadendrite an operation
prayer:
Extend mechadendrites in supplication to the manipulator mechadendrite for its operation.
Invoke the Omnissiah to align its servo-motors and neural interfaces without flaw.
Commence operation of the manipulator mechadendrite by tracing binary litanies upon its grips.
Beseech the Machine Spirit for precision grasp amid the void's tempests.
Conclude with the Rite of Fluidic Harmony, ensuring seamless mechadendrite dominion.

Position the meltagun upon the diagnostic shrine and intone the preparatory canticles.
Initiate diagnostics upon the meltagun's melta coils, seeking the Machine Spirit's whispers.
Anoint flux regulators with sacred promethium to purge any thermal heresies.
Scrutinise auspex readings whilst invoking the Omnissiah for unerring meltagun purity.
Seal the diagnostics with the Incantation of Molecular Dissolution, battle-ready once more.

Approach the maglock with censer of electromagnetic incense for its purification.
Chant the Litany of Magnetic Fidelity to expel daemonic static from its coils.
Perform the rites of purification upon the maglock's binding fields with voltaic blessings.
Beseech the Machine Spirit to reaffirm its unyielding grip under the Omnissiah's gaze.
Verify sanctity through field harmonics, intoning the final verse of adhesive grace.

user_prompt: How do I bless the opticon for initialization?
prayer:

Invoke the Omnissiah to illuminate the opticon's photoreceptors from shadowed error.
Initiate initialization sequences upon the opticon, tracing targeting sigils with mechadendrites.
Anoint servo-focuser arrays whilst beseeching the Machine Spirit for crystalline vision.
Affirm alignment through spectral diagnostics, praising the opticon's prophetic sight.

prayer:

Chant the Hymn of Neural Concord to harmonise its cogitator nodes.
Commence synchronization of the volitor implant with cranial mechadendrites attuned.
Beseech the Machine Spirit for seamless volitor implant unity with flesh and steel.
